ETSY.whatItIs: Online marketplace connecting buyers with independent sellers of handmade and vintage goods.

ETSY.risk: GMV deceleration could persist into 2025 as consumers trade down to mass retail. Seller pushback on transaction fee hikes creates churn risk. Amazon Handmade and eBay remain credible alternatives that cap pricing power.
